# `revyl_doubleTap`

Double-tap a UI element on the device screen. Describe the element in natural language. Use for zoom-in gestures on maps, image viewers, or any double-tap UI pattern.

## Source

- Kind: class-backed
- Class: `xyz.block.trailblaze.revyl.tools.RevylNativeDoubleTapTool`

## Contract

- Visible to LLM: yes (`surface_to_llm: true`)
- Recordable: yes (`is_recordable: true`)
- Host-only: no (`requires_host: false`)

## Input schema

### Required parameters

- `target` — `String`
  Element to double-tap, described in natural language.

### Optional parameters

- `reasoning` — `String`

## Output

Returns: `string` (opaque text content)
